recommendations.title: The Deer Hunter
recommendations.overview: Three steelworkers enlist in the army and are sent to Vietnam, one leaving behind a rushed marriage, the others a shared love. What they encounter during the war changes their lives forever.

recommendations.title: Desperate Hours
recommendations.overview: An escaped con, on the run from the law, moves into a married couple's house and takes over their lives.

recommendations.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
recommendations.overview: With the help of an irreverent young sidekick, a bank robber gets his old gang back together to organise a daring new heist.

recommendations.title: The Sunchaser
recommendations.overview: A young half-Navajo convict dying of cancer forces a yuppie doctor to drive him to a magic healing lake.

recommendations.title: The Sicilian
recommendations.overview: Egocentric bandit Salvatore Giuliano fights the Church, the Mafia, and the landed gentry while leading a populist movement for Sicilian independence.

recommendations.title: Heaven's Gate
recommendations.overview: Harvard graduate James Averill serves as the sheriff of prosperous Jackson County, Wyoming, standing at the center of a conflict between impoverished immigrants and affluent cattle farmers. Politically connected ranchers enlist mercenary Nathan Champ

recommendations.title: Pusher
recommendations.overview: A drug pusher grows increasingly desperate after a botched deal leaves him with a large debt to a ruthless drug lord.

recommendations.title: In the Heat of the Night
recommendations.overview: African-American Philadelphia police detective Virgil Tibbs is arrested on suspicion of murder by Bill Gillespie, the racist police chief of tiny Sparta, Mississippi. After Tibbs proves not only his own innocence but that of another man, he joins for

recommendations.title: Across 110th Street
recommendations.overview: In a daring robbery, some $300,000 is taken from the Italian mob. Several mafiosi are killed, as are two policemen. Lt. Pope and Capt. Mattelli are two New York City cops trying to break the case. Three small-time criminals are on the run with the mo

recommendations.title: The Getaway
recommendations.overview: A recently released ex-convict and his loyal wife go on the run after a heist goes wrong.
